closed_form_equation_v101.feature_term: K_f_v101 = K_f_v100 + K_f_v100 * S_sys_field_fabric_score * 0.004 + K_f_v100 * B_plastic_v45 * 0.001 + K_f_v100 * D_feature_v39 * 0.001
closed_form_equation_v101.structure_term: K_s_v101 = K_s_v100 + K_s_v100 * S_sys_field_fabric * 0.007 + K_s_v100 * B_struct_v45 * 0.004 + K_s_v100 * D_structure_v39 * 0.002
closed_form_equation_v101.learning_term: K_l_v101 = K_l_v100 + K_l_v100 * R_train_v45 + M_sys_field_fabric * 1000 + S_sys_field_fabric_score * 1000 + M_brain_direct_v39 * 1000

project_readout.summary: v101 checks whether systemic low-risk field mesh starts turning into a fabric-like low-risk field instead of only mesh-organizing the previous field.
project_readout.next_question: next push this fabric-like low-risk field into larger and longer systems to test whether it keeps organizing toward a lower-risk steady topology.
